items.name: Pigs Boson Collider
items.description: Utilizing the Large Hilarity Collider, researchers created the conditions immediately after the Big Chuckle and discovered the emergence of the Pigs Boson, the fundamental particle of funny that will destroy your target for hilarity.

items.name: Ice Breaker
items.description: First he makes it - then he breaks it!  Freeze your enemies, then destroy them while they're stuck in your icy trap.  Does an astounding 14 damage per hit.

items.name: Bundle of TNT
items.description: Industrially, TNT is synthesized in a three-step process. First, toluene is nitrated with a mixture of sulfuric and nitric acid to produce mono-nitrotoluene or MNT. The MNT is separated and then renitrated to dinitrotoluene or DNT. In the final step, the DNT is nitrated to trinitrotoluene or TNT using an anhydrous mixture of nitric acid and oleum. Nitric acid is consumed by the manufacturing process, but the diluted sulfuric acid can be reconcentrated and reused. Subsequent to nitration, TNT is stabilized by a process called sulphitation, where the crude TNT is treated with aqueous sodium sulfite solution in order to remove less stable isomers of TNT and other undesired reaction products. The rinse water from sulphitation is known as red water and is a significant pollutant and waste product of TNT manufacture.

items.name: Staff of Eggstra Large Eggs
items.description: Summon a giant flaming egg from the sky which will crash down and fling your foe far from his current location.

items.name: R-Orb
items.description: Charge a powerful orb and hurl it at your enemies as you fly above them.

items.name: Axe of the Divine Flame
items.description: From the darkest flames, I strike at thee! Click to swing dealing 15 damage, or double click to bash the axe down in front of you, dealing twice the damage to any enemies hit!

items.name: Math Homework
items.description: I was doing my math homework and there was this problem about if a plane travels at 11x the speed of a train and the train is 3x.....blah blah blah...I made a plane!

items.name: Instant Campfire
items.description: Pull up a log and roast a hot dog!

items.name: Poisonous Butterfly
items.description: Drop the jar to unleash the poisonous butterfly!  It will drop little balls of poison as it flutters around you.  As you get close to enemies it will throw extra poison at them.

items.name: Skipper Seal
items.description: Your first mate has got your back.  Even when he's a seal.  Click on a foe to have skipper seal slap him silly.

items.name: Double Fire Laser Gun
items.description: Click to fire two laser pellets. If they hit an enemy, they deal 15 damage. The 'Q' and 'L' keys toggle a light, and the 'X', 'C' toggle crouching and crawling.

items.name: Tambourine
items.description:
Hey! Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me, /
I'm not sleepy and there is no place I'm going to. /
Hey! Mr. Tambourine Man, play a song for me, /
In the jingle jangle morning I'll come followin' you.

items.name: Turkey Cannon
items.description: Shoots live turkeys!  Now if only we had a water gun that shot cranberry sauce...and ovens?

items.name: Staff of Shifting Polarity
items.description: When you use the Staff of Shifting Polarity, all near by players are pulled to the nearest object.  This force is unstoppable!

items.name: Harpoon
items.description: Catches small objects and brings them to you.

items.name: Blackhole Ray Gun
items.description: So you want to defeat your enemies?  Everyone does.  But then you want to take it a step further?  Then you need the Blackhole Ray Gun.  Creates a blackhole and sucks your foes remains into it!

items.name: Retro Candy
items.description: Put your enemies to sleep with six pieces of this delicious retro candy.

items.name: Makeshift Bow
items.description: The finest of bows, crafted by your own hands.

items.name: Ridable Raptor
items.description: Jump on this dino to ride it. Use the 'W' and 'S' keys to move forward and back, and use the 'A' and 'D' keys to turn left and right. Pressing space will cause the reptile to leap, and pressing left shift will dismount you from it.

items.name: Electric Blue
items.description: For rockers with soulful lyrics.
